race.comment: YOUWROTEUPONIT (3) returns from a five-month absence and has had a change in stables. Raced just three times when prepared in Victoria and recorded consistently good figures. The new yard has made some significant gear changes - betting might hold the key but on face value she looks the one to beat. PERMISSION GRANTED (2) last appeared when he bolted in over 1250m at Ballina in December. No heavy track form to draw upon but he should be ready to pick up where he left off following a couple of recent trials. Stablemate DEEP STEALTH (7) is a sparingly raced mare back from a spell. Comes to hand quickly as a rule and should continue that trend off the back of two trials dating back to 30 March. ALBY'S MATE (4) had a five-week break before a tiring fifth over this distance at Muswellbrook recently. Fitter and will give a great sight. EXCEED ME (5) resumes. Has filled a placing at both previous first-up runs and is a winner here at the trip.
